title: アオハル杯1戦目・次こそウィナー！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Man, we tied?! It sucks that we didn't win...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But our teamwork was awesome out there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We'll win the next race without a doubt!
